Contact & Support

Hero Section

Headline: "Get in Touch"

Subheadline: "Whether you have questions about our technology, want to schedule a demo, or need support—we're here to help."

Visual: Simple, welcoming illustration (hands reaching across a table, collaborative)

Section 1: Contact Options by Purpose

Headline: "How Can We Help?"

Option 1: Sales Inquiry / Demo Request

Use this if: You're evaluating Attentix for your team or organization.

Response time: Within 24 hours

What to expect:

  1. Initial email response with fact sheet
  2. Calendar invite for 30-min discovery call
  3. Demo with your use case in mind

[Request Demo →] (form below)

Option 2: Technical Support

Use this if: You're already using Attentix and need help.

Response time:

  • Starter plan: 24 hours
  • Scale plan: 4 hours
  • Enterprise plan: 1 hour

Support channels:

  • Email: support@attentix.ai
  • Slack: [Join community Slack]
  • Phone: +1 (415) 555-0123 (Enterprise only)

[Open Support Ticket →]

Option 3: Partnership & Integrations

Use this if: You're interested in partnering with Attentix (integrations, reselling, co-marketing).

Examples:

  • Build an integration for your platform
  • Become a technology partner
  • Co-author research or case studies

Contact: partnerships@attentix.ai

[Explore Partnership Program →]

Option 4: Careers & Hiring

Use this if: You're interested in joining our team.

Open positions: Product Manager, Senior Backend Engineer, Sales Engineer, DevRel Lead

View Careers Page →

Option 5: Press & Media

Use this if: You're a journalist or blogger writing about enterprise AI infrastructure.

Contact: press@attentix.ai

Recent Press:

  • TechCrunch: "Attentix AI Addresses the Enterprise ML Infrastructure Gap"
  • VentureBeat: "Why Explainability Is the New Competitive Advantage"

[View Press Kit →] (PDF with logos, bios, talking points)

Section 2: Contact Form

Headline: "Tell Us About Your Needs (2 minutes)"

Form Fields:

  1. What's your name?

    • Text input
    • Required

  2. What's your company?

    • Text input
    • Optional

  3. What's your email?

    • Email input
    • Required

  4. What's your primary interest?

    • Dropdown:
      • [ ] Sales / Demo
      • [ ] Technical Support
      • [ ] Partnership
      • [ ] Careers
      • [ ] Press
      • [ ] Other

  5. What's your industry? (if Sales is selected)

    • Dropdown:
      • [ ] Financial Services
      • [ ] Healthcare
      • [ ] Manufacturing & Supply Chain
      • [ ] Retail & E-Commerce
      • [ ] Telecom
      • [ ] Other

  6. What's your role? (if Sales is selected)

    • Dropdown:
      • [ ] Data Science / ML
      • [ ] Engineering / Infrastructure
      • [ ] Data Analytics
      • [ ] Executive / Decision Maker
      • [ ] Other

  7. Tell us about your project or question (optional)

    • Text area (500 char max)
    • Placeholder: "What are you trying to solve? What challenges are you facing?"

  8. How did you hear about us?

    • Dropdown:
      • [ ] Google search
      • [ ] LinkedIn
      • [ ] TechCrunch / Press
      • [ ] Referral
      • [ ] Conference / Event
      • [ ] Other

  9. Consent checkbox

    • [ ] I agree to Attentix AI contacting me about products and services
    • [ ] I'd like to receive occasional updates about new features and industry insights

  10. Submit Button

    • "Send Message" (primary CTA)
    • Or "I prefer a different contact method" (secondary)

After Submit:

  • Confirmation message: "Thanks! We'll be in touch within 24 hours."
  • Confirmation email sent with reference ID
  • Calendly widget appears (if Sales was selected)

Section 3: Frequently Asked Questions

Headline: "Quick Answers"

Sales & Product Questions

Q: What's the difference between Starter, Scale, and Enterprise plans? A: Primarily data volume and request throughput. All plans include the same features. See pricing page.

Q: Do you offer discounts for annual payment? A: Yes—15% discount for annual prepay. Contact sales@attentix.ai for details.

Q: Can I try Attentix before committing? A: Absolutely. Start a free 14-day trial here. No credit card required.

Q: What's your refund policy? A: 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied. No questions asked. (Enterprise contracts are negotiable.)

Technical Questions

Q: What data formats do you support? A: CSV, JSON, Parquet, Avro, Excel, Snowflake, BigQuery, PostgreSQL, S3, GCS, Kafka, REST APIs, and more. Full list →

Q: What's your uptime SLA? A: 99.9% (Starter/Scale), 99.99% (Enterprise). View our status page: [status.attentix.ai]

Q: How long does it take to get predictions after uploading data? A: For most datasets, predictions are ready in 2-5 minutes. For very large datasets (>100GB), 15-30 minutes.

Q: Can I deploy Attentix in my own cloud environment? A: Yes. Enterprise customers can deploy on AWS, GCP, or Azure VPC. Private cloud also available upon request.

Security & Compliance

Q: Is my data encrypted? A: Yes. AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. Security page →

Q: Are you HIPAA compliant? A: Yes, Attentix AI is HIPAA-eligible for healthcare customers. We sign HIPAA Business Associate Agreements (BAA).

Q: Do you comply with GDPR? A: Yes. We support data portability, right to deletion, and consent workflows. EU data is hosted in Frankfurt.

Q: Are you SOC2 certified? A: Yes, SOC2 Type II. Audit report available to Enterprise customers under NDA.

Implementation & Support

Q: How long does it take to go from POC to production? A: 2-4 weeks with our team, or 2-3 days if you're technical and prefer self-service.

Q: What if I need custom development? A: We offer professional services: custom model development ($50-150K), deployment support, and training. Contact sales@attentix.ai.

Q: What happens if I want to leave? A: You can export all your data and model configurations. No lock-in. [Data export policy →]

Section 4: Office & Locations

Headline: "Where to Find Us"

San Francisco HQ

Attentix AI, Inc.

1234 Mission Street San Francisco, CA 94103 USA

Phone: +1 (415) 555-0123 Email: hello@attentix.ai

Office hours: 9 AM - 6 PM PT, Monday-Friday

Directions: [Google Maps link]

Remote-First Team

We're distributed. Most team members are on US Pacific time, but we have members in Europe and Asia. Flexible meeting times available.

Section 5: Emergency Support

Headline: "Production Issues?"

For Enterprise Customers

If you have a critical production issue:

  1. Call our hotline: +1 (415) 555-0199 (24/7, Enterprise only)
  2. Email: urgent@attentix.ai (we monitor 24/7)
  3. Slack: #incidents in our Enterprise Slack workspace

Response SLA: 15 minutes for critical issues

What counts as critical:

  • Service is down or severely degraded for your production models
  • Data is inaccessible or corrupt
  • Security breach suspected

Section 6: Request Specific Information

Headline: "Looking for Something Specific?"

Pitch Deck

"For entrepreneurs and investors: our company overview, market opportunity, and traction."

  • [Download →] (gated, email required)

Security Whitepaper

"Deep dive into our architecture, encryption, compliance, and security practices."

  • [Download →] (gated, email required)

Enterprise Pricing Sheet

"Detailed pricing for Scale and Enterprise plans, volume discounts, and SLA terms."

  • [Contact sales@attentix.ai →]

API Documentation

"Full OpenAPI reference, code examples, and integration patterns."

  • [View Docs →] (https://docs.attentix.ai)

RFP / Security Questionnaire

"Pre-filled answers to common enterprise procurement questions."

  • [Request Template →] (email: procurement@attentix.ai)

Technical Architecture Diagram

"Systems-level overview of how Attentix processes data and generates predictions."

  • [Request →] (gated, email required, NDA may apply)

Section 7: Community & Events

Headline: "Join the Community"

Online Community

Attentix Community Forum

  • Ask questions and get answers from our team and other users
  • Share implementation examples
  • Vote on feature requests

[Join Community →] (community.attentix.ai)

Upcoming Events

Webinar: "Explainable AI in Production"

  • Date: Thursday, April 24, 2025
  • Time: 10 AM PT
  • Duration: 60 minutes
  • Speakers: [Name + title], [Name + title]
  • [Register →]

Workshop: "Building Risk Models with Attentix"

  • Date: Week of May 5, 2025
  • Time: 2-day cohort
  • Location: San Francisco (or virtual)
  • Cost: $1,000 (includes materials)
  • [Register →]

Conference Talks:

  • AI Summit 2025 (June, San Francisco)
  • Strata & AI World (Sept, New York)
  • ICML 2025 (Nov, Vienna)

Meetups & User Groups

San Francisco Data Infrastructure Meetup

  • Monthly on 2nd Tuesday at 6:30 PM
  • Location: Attentix AI office (1234 Mission St)
  • [Meetup.com page →]

NYC Enterprise ML Meetup

  • Quarterly
  • [Meetup.com page →]

Section 8: Social Media & Newsletter

Headline: "Stay Updated"

Follow Us

  • LinkedIn: [@AttentixAI] - Company updates, hiring, thought leadership
  • Twitter/X: [@AttentixAI] - Product updates, industry commentary, research
  • GitHub: [github.com/attentixai] - Code, examples, open-source projects
  • YouTube: [Attentix AI Channel] - Tutorials, webinars, product demos

Newsletter

Subscribe to "The Intelligence Brief" "Weekly insights on enterprise AI infrastructure, market trends, and product updates."

"By subscribing, you'll get: 1 research-backed insight, 1 product update, 1 customer story—every Friday in your inbox."

[Newsletter signup box]

  • Email input
  • [ ] I also want to hear about new features and special offers
  • "Subscribe" button

Section 9: Referral Program

Headline: "Know Someone Who Should Use Attentix?"

Earn Rewards

Refer a customer who signs up:

  • Referrer gets: 3 months free on your current plan (or $3,000 credit)
  • Referred customer gets: First month 50% off

No limit: Refer as many as you want. Rewards stack.

How it works:

  1. Email your referral link: [Share →]
  2. They click link and sign up
  3. Their first invoice closes → you get the reward
  4. Simple as that.

[Start Referring →]

Section 10: Feedback & Feature Requests

Headline: "Help Shape Our Roadmap"

We read every piece of feedback.

Share Your Ideas

Feature Requests: What would make Attentix better for your use case?

  • [Submit Feature Request →] (public roadmap)

Bug Reports: Found a problem?

  • [Report Bug →] (GitHub issues or support@attentix.ai)

General Feedback: Thoughts on our product, docs, or support?

  • Email: feedback@attentix.ai

Section 11: Accessibility & Accommodations

Headline: "We're Here for Everyone"

For Customers with Accessibility Needs

Our platform aims to be accessible to all users:

  • Website: WCAG 2.1 Level AA compliant
  • Dashboard: Keyboard navigation supported
  • Documentation: Alt text on all images

Having trouble? Contact: accessibility@attentix.ai

[Email signup]

Design Notes

  • Color Scheme: Precision Noir with warm accent highlights for important CTAs
  • Typography: Clean, readable sans-serif with good contrast
  • Form Design: Mobile-optimized, single-column layout, clear labels
  • Accessibility: Form labels tied to inputs, keyboard-navigable, screen-reader friendly
  • Responsiveness: Optimized for mobile (phone numbers clickable, emails are mailto links)
  • Trust Signals: Logos of industries we serve, testimonial snippets, response time badges
  • Tone: Friendly, professional, responsive—we're here to help
